subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down in truth from the dominion of God, the Most High, the Most Great, wherein lies that which hath enraptured the hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من جبروت الله العلی العظیم و فیه ما استجذبت به افئده
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @mindfulness; concentration; focus
